arts.ttl: Liverpool vs. PSG: Five Reds risk Champions League ban as Arne Slot faces nightmare scenario
arts.sum: Five Liverpool players run the risk of being banned for the first leg of the Champions League quarter-finals if they pick up yellow cards in Tuesday's clash with PSG.

arts.ttl: Slot: We'll need best performance of season to knock out 'complete' PSG
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot admits his side will have to produce their best performance of the season to ensure Champions League progress against "the most complete team we have faced".

arts.ttl: Liverpool's Hinds subjected to 'sexually inappropriate comments'
arts.sum: Liverpool defender Taylor Hinds says she is "determined to make a stand" after being subjected to "sexually inappropriate comments" from a fan.

arts.ttl: I'm glad Arne Slot exploded at Liverpool stars - I was a nutter but Darwin Nunez needs to be careful
arts.sum: John Aldridge looks at Liverpool's win over Southampton and Darwin Nunez's performance in his weekly ECHO column

arts.ttl: Man City, Man Utd Receive Red Flag Warning on €55M-Rated Star Who PSG Still Have Sell-on Clause
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain initially opted for a short-term solution by loaning Xavi Simons to RB Leipzig for another season. However, his future is now somewhat settled, as the German club has secured him on a permanent transfer. Nonetheless, PSG might have dodged a frustrating situation as a new report reveals Simons’ attitude at Leipzig. Still, with […] The post Man City, Man Utd Receive Red Flag Warning on €55M-Rated Star Who PSG Still Have Sell-on Clause appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: PSG leave Arne Slot with sleepless nights as Liverpool boss offers spiky Arsenal response
arts.sum: Liverpool take on Paris Saint-German at Anfield on Tuesday night looking to maintain their Champions League advantage to secure a place in the competition's quarter-finals

arts.ttl: Arne Slot admits he's changed his mind about 'angry and frustrated' Liverpool star
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot has admitted he's changed his mind about one of his star players who has stepped up to the plate in a big way over the last week

arts.ttl: What really happened with Mohamed Salah and Trent Alexander-Arnold as Liverpool pair spotted after training
arts.sum: Paul Gorst reports from Anfield on a busy day for Liverpool as they prepare to face Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League on Tuesday

arts.ttl: PSG boss Luis Enrique says winner of Liverpool tie will reach final
arts.sum: PSG trail 1-0 from their Champions League last-16 first leg in France.

arts.ttl: Liverpool predicted lineup vs PSG - Champions League
arts.sum: Liverpool's predicted lineup for the second leg of their Champions League round of 16 tie against PSG.
